title: Fix H_Mech decomposition logic
description: Table 5 shows Condition C (0.299) = Condition A (0.299). If trained decoder adds nothing beyond random decoder, decoder contribution is 0, not 0.299. Paper's decomposition is internally inconsistent.
verification: Run t-test on B vs D; if not significant, remove B>D anomaly claim. Recompute geometric contribution as abs(C) - abs(A) = 0, not 0.299.

title: Remove degenerate percentage column from Table 6
description: Section 4.5.2 Table 6 contains impossible values (134,717,856%, 1.52 billion%) from division by near-zero baseline. Remove 'Mean Delta Percent' column entirely.
verification: Confirm table no longer contains percentage values > 1000%

title: Define 'overlap method' or align H_Safe with multi-child methodology
description: Section 3.7 introduces 'overlap method' without definition. The paper's primary methodology is multi-child proportional ablation, yet H_Safe uses a different undefined method.
verification: Either define overlap method in Section 3.7, or state H_Safe uses same multi-child method, or justify why different method was used.

title: Add B vs D statistical test or remove B>D anomaly claim
description: B>D difference is 0.006 (0.490 vs 0.484). No p-value reported for this comparison. If not statistically significant, don't highlight as anomaly.
verification: Add t-test p-value for B vs D comparison; if p > 0.05, remove 'anomaly' framing.

title: Explain shuffled/permuted baseline gap
description: Random decoder = 0.059 but Shuffled = 0.487 and Permuted = 0.484. The 0.43 gap between random decoder and geometry-preserving baselines needs explanation.
verification: Add explanation for why breaking feature identity (shuffled) produces near-maximal absorption.

title: Clarify Table 1 Std=0.0000 for Trained SAE
description: Trained SAE absorption = 0.5000 with Std=0.0000 across 5 seeds is suspicious. Either state value is truly constant or verify measurement methodology.
verification: Add footnote if truly constant, or verify source data if potentially erroneous.

title: Add textual walkthrough for Figure 1
description: Figure 1 (Multi-child proportional ablation procedure) has only a caption with no prose description. Add 2-3 sentences describing what the figure shows.
verification: Confirm Section 3.4 now contains textual description of Figure 1.

title: Execute H_Downstream or remove from contributions
description: H_Downstream (does absorption affect downstream utility?) is listed as Priority 0 but never executed. Either add pilot results or remove from paper contributions.
verification: If not executed, remove H_Downstream from contributions and add as future work.

title: Split overloaded abstract sentence
description: Abstract line 5 packs five hypotheses into one sentence, burying the safety finding. Split into 2-3 sentences for readability.
verification: Confirm abstract no longer has a single sentence containing >3 hypothesis results.

title: Add H_Comp results to paper or document why omitted
description: H_Comp (hierarchy strength dependence) passed in pilot but is absent from the paper. Either add results or explain why omitted.
verification: Either include H_Comp results or add sentence explaining why omitted from this paper.
